event: Carpet sellers in an Oriental marketplace
description: A watercolor scene showing men in a narrow street or marketplace beneath stone archways. Two merchants in the foreground display and examine richly patterned carpets in reds, blues, and intricate geometric designs. One wears a red fez, the other a turban. Additional figures in robes stand in the background beneath the arches. The architecture is whitewashed stone with blue-painted details. Warm light illuminates the scene from the left. The palette is warm and vibrant.
